framework_name: NIST SP 800-172 — Enhanced Security Requirements for Protecting CUI

controls.title: Employ dual authorization to execute critical or sensitive system and organizational operations
controls.description: Employ dual authorization to execute critical or sensitive system and organizational operations

controls.title: Restrict access to systems and system components to only those information resources that are owned, provisioned, or issued by the organization
controls.description: Restrict access to systems and system components to only those information resources that are owned, provisioned, or issued by the organization

controls.title: Employ secure information transfer solutions to control information flows between security domains on connected systems
controls.description: Employ secure information transfer solutions to control information flows between security domains on connected systems

controls.title: Provide awareness training focused on recognizing and responding to threats from social engineering, advanced persistent threat actors, breaches, and suspicious behaviors
controls.description: Provide awareness training focused on recognizing and responding to threats from social engineering, advanced persistent threat actors, breaches, and suspicious behaviors

controls.title: Include practical exercises in awareness training that are aligned with current threat scenarios and provide feedback to individuals involved in the training and their supervisors
controls.description: Include practical exercises in awareness training that are aligned with current threat scenarios and provide feedback to individuals involved in the training and their supervisors

controls.title: Deploy an audit record generation capability that provides an organization-defined level of auditing of user-level and system-level activities that supports real-time alerting and analysis
controls.description: Deploy an audit record generation capability that provides an organization-defined level of auditing of user-level and system-level activities that supports real-time alerting and analysis

controls.title: Establish and maintain an authoritative source and repository to provide a trusted source and accountability for approved and implemented system components
controls.description: Establish and maintain an authoritative source and repository to provide a trusted source and accountability for approved and implemented system components

controls.title: Employ automated mechanisms to detect misconfigured or unauthorized system components and place components that cannot be remediated into a quarantine or remediation network
controls.description: Employ automated mechanisms to detect misconfigured or unauthorized system components and place components that cannot be remediated into a quarantine or remediation network

controls.title: Employ automated discovery and management tools to maintain an up-to-date, complete, accurate, and readily available inventory of system components
controls.description: Employ automated discovery and management tools to maintain an up-to-date, complete, accurate, and readily available inventory of system components

controls.title: Identify and authenticate systems and system components, where possible, before establishing a network connection using bidirectional authentication that is cryptographically-based and replay-resistant
controls.description: Identify and authenticate systems and system components, where possible, before establishing a network connection using bidirectional authentication that is cryptographically-based and replay-resistant

controls.title: Employ automated mechanisms for the generation, protection, rotation, and management of passwords for systems and system components that do not support multifactor authentication or complex account management
controls.description: Employ automated mechanisms for the generation, protection, rotation, and management of passwords for systems and system components that do not support multifactor authentication or complex account management

controls.title: Employ automated or manual/procedural mechanisms to prohibit system components from connecting to organizational systems unless the components are known, authenticated, in a properly configured state, or in a trust profile
controls.description: Employ automated or manual/procedural mechanisms to prohibit system components from connecting to organizational systems unless the components are known, authenticated, in a properly configured state, or in a trust profile

controls.title: Establish and maintain a security operations center capability that facilitates a 24/7 response capability
controls.description: Establish and maintain a security operations center capability that facilitates a 24/7 response capability

controls.title: Establish and maintain a cyber incident response team that can be deployed by the organization within 24 hours
controls.description: Establish and maintain a cyber incident response team that can be deployed by the organization within 24 hours

controls.title: Employ threat intelligence, at a minimum from open or commercial sources and any DoD-provided sources, as part of a risk assessment to guide and inform the development of organizational systems, security architectures, selection of security solutions, monitoring, threat hunting, and response and recovery activities
controls.description: Employ threat intelligence, at a minimum from open or commercial sources and any DoD-provided sources, as part of a risk assessment to guide and inform the development of organizational systems, security architectures, selection of security solutions, monitoring, threat hunting, and response and recovery activities

controls.title: Conduct cyber threat hunting activities to search for indicators of compromise in organizational systems and detect, track, and disrupt threats that evade existing controls
controls.description: Conduct cyber threat hunting activities to search for indicators of compromise in organizational systems and detect, track, and disrupt threats that evade existing controls

controls.title: Employ advanced automation and analytics capabilities in support of analysts to predict and identify risks to organizations, systems, and system components
controls.description: Employ advanced automation and analytics capabilities in support of analysts to predict and identify risks to organizations, systems, and system components

controls.title: Document or reference in the system security plan the security solution selected, the rationale for the security solution, and the risk determination
controls.description: Document or reference in the system security plan the security solution selected, the rationale for the security solution, and the risk determination

controls.title: Assess the effectiveness of security solutions at least annually to address anticipated risk and to respond to a continually evolving threat landscape
controls.description: Assess the effectiveness of security solutions at least annually to address anticipated risk and to respond to a continually evolving threat landscape

controls.title: Assess, respond to, and monitor supply chain risks associated with organizational systems and system components
controls.description: Assess, respond to, and monitor supply chain risks associated with organizational systems and system components

controls.title: Develop a plan for managing supply chain risks associated with organizational systems and system components; update the plan at least annually and upon receipt of relevant cyber threat information
controls.description: Develop a plan for managing supply chain risks associated with organizational systems and system components; update the plan at least annually and upon receipt of relevant cyber threat information

controls.title: Conduct penetration testing at least annually, leveraging automated scanning tools and ad hoc tests using subject matter experts
controls.description: Conduct penetration testing at least annually, leveraging automated scanning tools and ad hoc tests using subject matter experts

controls.title: Employ diverse system components to reduce the extent of malicious code propagation
controls.description: Employ diverse system components to reduce the extent of malicious code propagation

controls.title: Employ a physically or logically isolated subnetwork with managed interfaces to restrict communications traffic from systems that process CUI to systems with other data protection requirements
controls.description: Employ a physically or logically isolated subnetwork with managed interfaces to restrict communications traffic from systems that process CUI to systems with other data protection requirements

controls.title: Enforce design, implementation, and operation principles to maximize the use of automation and to minimize the use of trust between system components
controls.description: Enforce design, implementation, and operation principles to maximize the use of automation and to minimize the use of trust between system components

controls.title: Employ technical and procedural means to confuse and mislead adversaries through a combination of misdirection, tainting, or disinformation
controls.description: Employ technical and procedural means to confuse and mislead adversaries through a combination of misdirection, tainting, or disinformation

controls.title: Employ technical means to dynamically change aspects of organizational systems, system components, locations of critical functions/resources, or system configurations to increase the attack surface uncertainty and the level of effort required of adversaries
controls.description: Employ technical means to dynamically change aspects of organizational systems, system components, locations of critical functions/resources, or system configurations to increase the attack surface uncertainty and the level of effort required of adversaries

controls.title: Verify the integrity of security-critical and essential software using root of trust mechanisms or cryptographic signatures
controls.description: Verify the integrity of security-critical and essential software using root of trust mechanisms or cryptographic signatures

controls.title: Monitor organizational systems and system components on an ongoing basis for anomalous or suspicious behavior
controls.description: Monitor organizational systems and system components on an ongoing basis for anomalous or suspicious behavior

controls.title: Employ technical and procedural means to analyze events, incidents, alerts, security advisories, and related information on a real-time or near-real-time basis
controls.description: Employ technical and procedural means to analyze events, incidents, alerts, security advisories, and related information on a real-time or near-real-time basis

controls.title: Refresh organizational systems and system components from a known, trusted state periodically
controls.description: Refresh organizational systems and system components from a known, trusted state periodically

controls.title: Conduct reviews of persistent organizational storage locations periodically and remove CUI that is no longer needed
controls.description: Conduct reviews of persistent organizational storage locations periodically and remove CUI that is no longer needed

controls.title: Use threat indicator information and effective mitigations obtained from organizational or external sources to guide and inform intrusion detection and threat hunting
controls.description: Use threat indicator information and effective mitigations obtained from organizational or external sources to guide and inform intrusion detection and threat hunting

controls.title: Verify the correctness of security-critical or essential software, firmware, and hardware components using developer-provided tools, techniques, methods, and formal verification methodologies
controls.description: Verify the correctness of security-critical or essential software, firmware, and hardware components using developer-provided tools, techniques, methods, and formal verification methodologies
